headerDisplay: Controls a Seeley MagIQTouch ducted gas heater via the Seeley cloud. Use the same email and password as the MagIQtouch mobile app.
footerDisplay: For process isolation, run this as a child bridge (add a `_bridge` block to the platform config — see the plugin README). Your credentials are stored in Homebridge's config.json in plain text.

pollInterval.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to re-request status as a safety net (the plugin also receives live updates).

exposeFan.title: Expose fan speed
exposeFan.description: Show the heater fan speed as a slider on the heater tile.

exposeFanOnlyMode.title: Expose fan-only mode
exposeFanOnlyMode.description: Add a separate Fan accessory for running the heater fan without heating.

debug.title: Verbose logging
debug.description: Log full status payloads and protocol traffic.
